analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,800 as of Apr 27 ~16:21 UTC (+2.7% in 24h). Range $77,595-$79,400. Approaching $80,000 psychological resistance. Support $77,500 / $75,900.

6 consecutive days of positive net BTC spot ETF inflows

analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC Day 1 tomorrow (Apr 28); rate decision Apr 29 18:00 UTC. Rate hold ~100% probability. Biggest risk = hawkish tone from Powell. No CPI/PPI in 24h window. DeFi hack adds caution. ETF flows positive but $80K resistance not yet broken. Fear & Greed at 31 suggests retail still cautious despite price strength.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.50): BTC has strong momentum and institutional support, but the combination of $80K unbroken resistance, Fear & Greed at 31 (Fear), near 50-50 long-short positioning, and FOMC starting tomorrow all create a balanced risk picture. Confidence=0.50 is at the bot activation threshold — will apply macro filter. Signals favoring bullish: ETF inflows, monthly +13.71%, institutional buying. Signals favoring caution: Fear zone, $80K resistance, FOMC uncertainty, DeFi hack overhang.
